### Checklist

- [ ] The project is **open source** with a clear license
- [ ] The project has a **README** with installation instructions
- [ ] The project is **actively maintained** (commit within 12 months)
- [ ] The project is relevant to **AI + CAE/CAD/CAM** workflows
- [ ] I added the item in **alphabetical order** within its section
- [ ] I used the correct format: `[owner/repo](url) \`Lang\` — Description`
- [ ] The description is concise (one line) and highlights AI/automation relevance
- [ ] CI checks pass (awesome-lint + link checker)
